text: I sense an air of curiosity and anticipation in this modern, glass-walled environment. The emptiness of the boardroom and the clear design suggest preparation—perhaps for learning, collaborating, or the sharing of ideas. As I step into the vivid and dynamic R+D exhibition, words about relics and coded conversation resonate with me. I feel contemplative and somewhat nostalgic, aware of my presence amid technology, history, and the ongoing search for meaning. The interplay between isolation and connection stirs a thoughtful sense of belonging and wonder.
